title: Logical error: 'false && "Tasks in BackgroundSchedulePool cannot throw"' with Iceberg
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int NULL) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 Int', 11949875799272850824, 7490, 3) LIMIT 10;
SELECT 1 FROM t0 WHERE c0 = 'A' AND c0 = 1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR, c3 DOUBLE, c4 TIMESTAMP) AS SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14, NULL), (2, 'example', 2.71, '2023-10-01 12:00:00'));
CREATE TABLE t2 (c5 INTEGER, c6 INTEGER, c7 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO t2 (c5, c6, c7) SELECT c1, c3, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 > 2.0;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c2 = 'test' AND c3 = 3.14 AND c4 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Logical error with Iceberg table query execution
